item.title: Valerie Bertinelli Reveals She Was Sexually Abused at Age 11: ‘I Don't Feel Shame About It Anymore. I’m Pissed Off That It Happened’ (Exclusive)
item.description: The star opens up to PEOPLE in this week's cover story ahead of the release of her new memoir, 'Getting Naked'

item.title: Jason Kelce's 5-Year-Old Daughter Ellie Adorably Crashes “New Heights” Podcast: 'Love You, Uncle Travvy, Love You, Randy Moss'
item.description: The cutie was trying to put her jacket on when she popped into the podcast studio

item.title: Why Did Martha Stewart Go to Prison? What to Know About Her Time Behind Bars Over 2 Decades Ago
item.description: The media mogul was released from prison after five months on March 4, 2005

item.title: Sarah Ferguson 'Will Find It Very Hard to Come Back' After Ex-Prince Andrew's Arrest: 'This Has Really Hit Her' (Exclusive)
item.description: "She always thinks she can bounce back," a friend tells PEOPLE in this week's cover story. "But this isn’t something that can blow over"

item.title: Meet the Real-Life Loves of the “Scrubs” Cast (Including One Couple Who Met Through Zach Braff)
item.description: Donald Faison met his wife, CaCee Cobb, at Zach Braff's 30th birthday party
